caption: A man with a beard, wearing black headphones and a white t-shirt, is seated in a recording studio. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels with a ribbed texture. He is positioned behind a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm. In the initial moments, he looks slightly to the left with a small smile and gestures with his right hand. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his gaze and expression, transitioning from a broad smile to a more focused, slightly amused look while glancing toward the right. His white t-shirt features a circular logo on the chest with the text "Stay Authentic" written in a stylized script. The man remains in the same position throughout the clip, with the only changes being his facial expressions and the movement of his eyes and hand.
